recommendations.title: The Bells of St. Mary's
recommendations.overview: Father O'Malley is sent to St. Mary's, a run-down parochial school on the verge of condemnation. He and Sister Benedict work together in an attempt to save the school, though their differing methods often lead to good-natured disagreements.

recommendations.title: The Awful Truth
recommendations.overview: Unfounded suspicions lead a married couple to begin divorce proceedings, whereupon they start undermining each other's attempts to find new romance.

recommendations.title: Make Way for Tomorrow
recommendations.overview: An elderly couple are forced to separate themselves from each other after their children refuse to take both into one house.

recommendations.title: An Affair to Remember
recommendations.overview: A couple falls in love and agrees to meet in six months at the Empire State Building - but will it happen?

recommendations.title: Duck Soup
recommendations.overview: Rufus T. Firefly is named president/dictator of bankrupt Freedonia and declares war on neighboring Sylvania over the love of wealthy Mrs. Teasdale.

recommendations.title: Love Affair
recommendations.overview: A French playboy and an American former nightclub singer fall in love aboard a ship. They arrange to reunite six months later, if neither has changed their mind.

recommendations.title: Cast Away
recommendations.overview: Chuck Noland, a top international manager for FedEx, and Kelly, a Ph.D. student, are in love and heading towards marriage. Then Chuck's plane to Malaysia crashes at sea during a terrible storm. He's the only survivor, and finds himself marooned on a

recommendations.title: All Too Well: The Short Film
recommendations.overview: Short film featuring the extended version of the song “All Too Well” by Taylor Swift. A troubled couple's romance blossoms before it eventually falls apart.

recommendations.title: The Courageous Heart of Irena Sendler
recommendations.overview: Irena Sendler is a Catholic social worker who has sympathized with the Jews since her childhood, when her physician father died of typhus contracted while treating poor Jewish patients. When she initially proposes saving Jewish children from the Wars

recommendations.title: Joyful Noise
recommendations.overview: G.G. Sparrow faces off with her choir's newly appointed director, Vi Rose Hill, over the group's direction as they head into a national competition.
